## Scope check

ogmac is intentionally narrow: one-way Outlook → Google calendar sync on macOS. The following are explicitly out of scope and will be closed:

- Two-way sync
- Multiple calendar pairs
- Categories, colors, or reminders mapping
- Attachment handling
- Any GUI
- Multi-user packaging

If your request falls outside that, consider whether it could live as a separate tool.
